case_title: CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION & A/C CO. INC VS. CYBAR LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-21-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION & A/C CO. INC
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BARBARA ANSCHER FILED BY CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION & A/C CO. INC CYBAR LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION & A/C CO. INC AS TO DEFENDANT CYBAR LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2009 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CYBAR LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-14-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION & A/C CO. INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CYBAR LLC $370.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $446.00, COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO OBTAIN SIGNED CHANGE ORDERS AS REQUIRED BY THE CONTRACT. THEREFORE, SINCE DEFENDANT DISPUTES ALL OF THE WORK PERFORMED BY DEFENDANT, WITH THE EXCEPTION OF THE DOOR BELL REPAIR ($370.00), THE COURT MUST RELUCTANTLY DENY THE REMAINDER OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, EVEN THOUGH THE COURT DOES BELIEVE THAT PLAINTIFF PERFORMED THE WORK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CYBAR LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,663.06 FILED BY CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION & A/C CO. INC AS TO DEFENDANT CYBAR LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
